top3.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM account a
JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
JOIN trans t ON a.account_id = t.account_id
WHERE t.k_symbol = 'issuance' AND a.district_id IN (
    SELECT district_id 
    FROM district 
    WHERE A2 = 'East Bohemia'
);

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT t.account_id)
FROM trans t
JOIN account a ON t.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE t.operation = 'issuance' AND d.A2 = 'East Bohemia';

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM account a
JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
JOIN trans t ON a.account_id = t.account_id
WHERE t.k_symbol = 'issuance' AND a.district_id IN (
    SELECT district_id 
    FROM district 
    WHERE A2 = 'East Bohemia'
);

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT a.account_id)
FROM account a
JOIN district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM trans t
    WHERE t.account_id = a.account_id
    AND t.operation = 'issuance'
)
AND d.A2 = 'East Bohemia';

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT a.account_id) 
FROM account a
JOIN trans t ON a.account_id = t.account_id
WHERE t.k_symbol = 'issuance' 
  AND a.district_id IN (
    SELECT district_id 
    FROM district 
    WHERE A2 = 'East Bohemia'
);

final.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM account a
JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
JOIN trans t ON a.account_id = t.account_id
WHERE t.k_symbol = 'issuance' AND a.district_id IN (
    SELECT district_id 
    FROM district 
    WHERE A2 = 'East Bohemia'
);
